meta.name: production-demo
meta.description: Production-ready Next.js 16 SaaS scaffold: Prisma + Neon Postgres + Tailwind 4 + Vitest + ESLint + Better-Auth + Sentry + Resend + Umami + Vercel deploy + GitHub Actions CI + git hooks. All free-tier services, no vendor lock-in beyond Vercel for hosting (which has a generous free tier and easy migration to self-hosted Docker).

features.title: user can sign up + sign in with email/password
done_when: POST /api/auth/sign-up creates a user; POST /api/auth/sign-in returns a session

features.title: production observability — errors auto-reported to Sentry, page views tracked in Umami
done_when: thrown errors appear in Sentry within 30s
page views show in Umami dashboard

features.title: transactional email sends via Resend
done_when: sendEmail() helper delivers a test email to the inbox

features.title: CI gates and local hooks block bad pushes
done_when: GitHub Actions CI runs lint+tsc+test+build on every push to main
git pre-commit blocks commit on lint/tsc errors
git pre-push blocks push on build failure
